name: Concavity
summary: Enumerates the possible types of edge concavity types.

enum_values.name: None
enum_values.summary: Concavity is not relevant, for example naked and non-manifold edges cannot have a concavity measure.

enum_values.name: Tangent
enum_values.summary: Faces on either side of the edge are tangent within tolerance.

enum_values.name: Convex
enum_values.summary: Faces on either side of the edge are convex.

enum_values.name: Concave
enum_values.summary: Faces on either side of the edge are concave.
